summary: Completed E2E testing of Quiz Translation and Statistics features. Backend: 13/13 tests pass - categories translate correctly in 6 languages (it, es, en, de, fr, pt), questions translate on-demand, quiz submit returns proper statistics (score, correct_count, total, results array). Frontend: Quiz UI loads correctly with 3 tabs, 33 categories visible, quiz starts properly showing questions with 4 options.

issues: Quiz icons show generic help-circle (❓) for all categories - This is intentional design as per Icon.tsx emoji map. All thematic quiz categories use 'help-circle' icon.

critical_code_review_comments: Quiz translation on-demand uses OpenAI GPT-4o via Emergent LLM Key - working correctly
Quiz submit endpoint properly supports both classic and category quizzes (checks topic.startswith('cat_'))
Results structure includes: score, correct_count, total, results[] with is_correct, correct_answer, user_answer, explanation, verse_ref
UI properly displays wrongAnswers and correctAnswers sections with explanations

success_rate.frontend: 95% - UI verified working, quiz flow functional

seed_data_creation: None - quiz data from quiz_categories_data.json, translations cached in quiz_translations_cache.json
context_for_next_testing_agent: Quiz translation and statistics features fully tested. Backend endpoints: GET /api/quiz/categories?lang={code}, GET /api/quiz/category/{id}?lang={code}, POST /api/quiz/submit. All working correctly. Translations use GPT-4o on-demand and are cached.

quiz_categories_translation.details: Category titles translate correctly (La Creazione -> The Creation -> La Creación, etc.)

quiz_questions_translation.details: Questions translate on-demand using GPT-4o, cached for future use

quiz_submit_statistics.details: Returns score, correct_count, total, results[], feedback

results_structure.details: Each result contains: question_id, is_correct, correct_answer, user_answer, explanation, verse_ref

ui_quiz_tabs.details: 3 tabs visible: Quiz Tematici (default selected), Quiz Classici, Studio Avanzato

ui_categories_display.details: 33 categories displayed with title, description, question count

ui_icons_quiz_section.details: Icons show help-circle (❓) emoji - intentional per Icon.tsx emoji map
